title: Tiny Takeback
description: Take back classic eyes for the new baby mobs in Tiny Takeover game drop!
body: --- In the Tiny Takeover game drop, Mojang has redesigned almost all baby mobs, and many of their eyes are now in 1 pixel now. With these new models unchanged, this pack brings back the classic 2-pixel eyes for many baby mobs, and even make more changes to ensure them look familiar! ![Baby Mobs in Overworld](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8TF0sWCi/images/1113eb33b545fbe5fa049b5f1768167b0401bc2c.png) ## Features - Piglet - Including temperate, warm, and cold variants - Calf - Including temperate, warm, and cold variants - Mooshroom Calf - Their eyes keep unchanged, as 2x2px entirely dark eyes look weird - Lamb - Their face is changed to look more familiar to adult sheeps - Baby Donkey & Mule - The light section of their legs are now different from each other - Baby Zombie horse & Skeleton horse - Changed their eyes' position by 1px to match foals - Baby Skeleton Horses now have a short bony tail, and their legs are now different from each other - Wolf pup - Wild/angry/tamed, in all variants - Angry pups have red iris, instead of entirely red eyes - Baby Polar Bear - Now they have eyebrows - Kitten - Siamese cats are also made lighter to reflect their baby look in real life - Baby Ocelot - Baby Fox - Baby Llama - Their eyes are now in a more reasonable position - Baby Strider - Their design is made more similar to adult striders - Baby Zombified Piglin - Their eyes are now in a more reasonable position - Baby Hoglin & Zoglin - Their eyes are now in a more reasonable position - Eyes of other hostile/aquatic mobs and baby goat (kid) remain unchanged
